request.description: Authenticates a user with email and password and returns a JWT token. Returns user details upon successful login. **POST API** [https://rent-nest-two.vercel.app/api/auth/login](https://rent-nest-two.vercel.app/api/auth/login) **REQUEST BODY** `{` `"email": "`[abduljabbar@example.com](https://mailto:abduljabbar@example.com)`",` `"password": "password123"` `}` **REQUEST RESPONSE** `{ "success": true, "statusCode": 200, "message": "User logged in successfully", "data": { "accessToken": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpZCI6IjNjMTZiMWJjLWM4ODctNGUxYy04MzM3LWMzNTI5NDY0NjdlZSIsImVtYWlsIjoiYWJkdWxqYWJiYXJAZXhhbXBsZS5jb20iLCJuYW1lIjoiQWJkdWwgSmFiYmFyIiwicm9sZSI6IlRFTkFOVCIsInN0YXR1cyI6IkFDVElWRSIsImlhdCI6MTc4NDQyMDQ5MiwiZXhwIjoxNzg0NTA2ODkyfQ.m3lZY8J_UrwH-EfUe9QEWQVTFY5t9SLyiKg-Kfc66O8", "refreshToken": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpZCI6IjNjMTZiMWJjLWM4ODctNGUxYy04MzM3LWMzNTI5NDY0NjdlZSIsImVtYWlsIjoiYWJkdWxqYWJiYXJAZXhhbXBsZS5jb20iLCJuYW1lIjoiQWJkdWwgSmFiYmFyIiwicm9sZSI6IlRFTkFOVCIsInN0YXR1cyI6IkFDVElWRSIsImlhdCI6MTc4NDQyMDQ5MiwiZXhwIjoxNzg1MDI1MjkyfQ.fgMKdLYIpVmV5RxBbUgvBQZTKBHpRpuqFSbajyTWxTQ", "user": { "id": "3c16b1bc-c887-4e1c-8337-c352946467ee", "name": "Abdul Jabbar", "email": "`[abduljabbar@example.com](https://mailto:abduljabbar@example.com)`", "phone": "+8801711111111", "profilePhoto": null, "role": "TENANT", "status": "ACTIVE", "stripeCustomerId": null, "hasCompletedPayment": false, "createdAt": "2026-07-09T11:32:12.100Z", "updatedAt": "2026-07-09T11:32:12.100Z" } } }`

Registers a new user on the platform. The user must choose a role (TENANT, LANDLORD, or ADMIN) during registration. REGISTER USER API [https://rent-nest-two.vercel.app/api/auth/register](https://rent-nest-two.vercel.app/api/auth/register) REQUEST BODY { `"name": "tenant 5",` `"email": "`[tenant5@example.com](https://mailto:tenant5@example.com)`",` `"password": "password123",` `"phone": "+8801712345679",` `"role": "TENANT"` `}` REQUEST RESPONSE `{ "success": true, "statusCode": 201, "message": "User registered successfully", "data": { "user": { "id": "cf311709-df63-4b7e-b3ad-ca71a39afc18", "name": "tenant 5", "email": "`[tenant5@example.com](https://mailto:tenant5@example.com)`", "phone": "+8801712345679", "profilePhoto": null, "role": "TENANT", "status": "ACTIVE", "stripeCustomerId": null, "hasCompletedPayment": false, "createdAt": "2026-07-19T10:04:59.904Z", "updatedAt": "2026-07-19T10:04:59.904Z" } } }`

Retrieves the profile of the currently authenticated user. Requires a Bearer token. **GET API** [https://rent-nest-two.vercel.app/api/auth/me](https://rent-nest-two.vercel.app/api/auth/me) **REQUEST RESPONSE** `{ "success": true, "statusCode": 200, "message": "User profile fetched successfully", "data": { "id": "3c16b1bc-c887-4e1c-8337-c352946467ee", "name": "Abdul Jabbar", "email": "`[abduljabbar@example.com](https://mailto:abduljabbar@example.com)`", "phone": "+8801711111111", "profilePhoto": null, "role": "TENANT", "status": "ACTIVE", "stripeCustomerId": "cus_UuXaIkxOSSrxzs", "hasCompletedPayment": true, "createdAt": "2026-07-09T11:32:12.100Z", "updatedAt": "2026-07-19T00:22:49.391Z" } }`

Logs out the currently authenticated user and invalidates the session. Requires a Bearer token.

**POST API**

[https://rent-nest-two.vercel.app/api/auth/logout](https://rent-nest-two.vercel.app/api/auth/logout)

**REQUEST BODY**

`{}`

**REQUEST RESPONSE**

`{ "success": true, "statusCode": 200, "message": "User logged out successfully", "data": { "message": "Logged out successfully" } }`

query.description: SearchTerm => search in title and description of property

request.description:
Retrieves a paginated list of all available rental properties. Public endpoint — no authentication required. Supports optional query parameters: `searchTerm`, `city`, `location`, `address`, `price`, `minprice`, `maxprice`, `categoryId`, `page`, `limit`.

**GET API**

[https://rent-nest-two.vercel.app/api/properties](https://rent-nest-two.vercel.app/api/properties)

**REQUEST RESPONSE**

`{   "success": true,   "statusCode": 200,   "message": "Property retrieved successfully!",   "data": [...{},...]   }`

Retrieves the details of a single property by its ID. Public endpoint — no authentication required. **GET API** [https://rent-nest-two.vercel.app/api/properties/523c4166-1cf0-4cc5-b42d-fd8ce91220b7](https://rent-nest-two.vercel.app/api/properties/523c4166-1cf0-4cc5-b42d-fd8ce91220b7) **REQUEST RESPONSE** `{ "success": true, "statusCode": 200, "message": "property retrieved successfully by property id!", "data": { "id": "523c4166-1cf0-4cc5-b42d-fd8ce91220b7", "landlordId": "26d8cc7f-9b13-4fe2-bfda-df8eb2190195", "categoryId": "36788eab-f75e-488c-8120-8252fab6c49c", "title": "Elegant 5 Bedroom Duplex House in Bashundhara R/A", "slug": "elegant-5-bedroom-duplex-house-in-bashundhara-ra", "description": "A beautifully designed duplex house with spacious living areas, a landscaped backyard, modern kitchen, and dedicated parking. Perfect for large families seeking comfort and privacy.", "rentAmount": "110000", "securityDeposit": "220000", "address": "House 27, Block F, Bashundhara Residential Area", "city": "Dhaka", "area": "Bashundhara R/A", "country": "Bangladesh", "postalCode": "1229", "bedrooms": 5, "bathrooms": 5, "type": "UNKNOWN", "sizeSqft": "3600", "images": [ "`[https://example.com/house-4.jpg"](https://example.com/house-4.jpg)`, "`[https://example.com/house-5.jpg"](https://example.com/house-5.jpg)`, "`[https://example.com/house-6.jpg"](https://example.com/house-6.jpg)` ], "amenities": [ "Private Garage", "Front Lawn", "Backyard", "Rooftop Terrace", "Balcony", "Generator", "24/7 Security", "CCTV", "High-Speed Internet", "Servant Room" ], "status": "PUBLISHED", "isAvailable": true, "availableFrom": "2026-09-01T00:00:00.000Z", "userId": null, "createdAt": "2026-07-18T15:07:32.199Z", "updatedAt": "2026-07-18T15:31:23.879Z" } }`

Retrieves a list of all property categories. Public endpoint — no authentication required.

**GET API**

[https://rent-nest-two.vercel.app/api/categories](https://rent-nest-two.vercel.app/api/categories)

**REQUEST RESPONSE**

`{ "success": true, "statusCode": 200, "message": "Categories retrieved successfully", "data": [ { "id": "a2c49963-308b-478c-9f42-262edff5e996", "name": "Apartment", "slug": "apartment", "description": "Residential apartment rental listings", "isActive": true, "createdAt": "2026-07-09T14:04:35.933Z", "updatedAt": "2026-07-09T14:04:35.933Z" } ] }`

Creates a new property category. Requires Admin Bearer token.

**POST API**

[https://rent-nest-two.vercel.app/api/categories](https://rent-nest-two.vercel.app/api/categories)

**REQUEST BODY**

`{`

`"name": "Apartment",`

`"description": "Residential apartment rental listings",`

`"slug": "apartment"`

`}`

**REQUEST RESPONSE**

`{ "success": true, "statusCode": 201, "message": "Category created successfully", "data": { "id": "55f0ad3b-fddf-4586-b96d-78eb49c286f9", "name": "penthouse", "slug": "house", "description": "A Premium, luxury apartment", "isActive": true, "createdAt": "2026-07-19T12:18:25.175Z", "updatedAt": "2026-07-19T12:18:25.175Z" } }`

Deletes a property listing by its ID. Requires a Landlord or Admin Bearer token.

**DELETE API**

[https://rent-nest-two.vercel.app/api/landlord/properties/b28f71eb-5cdd-43ed-bb92-b95dae2ec7f7](https://rent-nest-two.vercel.app/api/landlord/properties/b28f71eb-5cdd-43ed-bb92-b95dae2ec7f7)

**REQUEST RESPONSE**

`{   "success": true,   "statusCode": 200,   "message": "Property Deleted Successfully!",   "data": null   }`

Retrieves all rental requests submitted for the authenticated landlord's properties. Requires a Landlord Bearer token. **GET API** [https://rent-nest-two.vercel.app/api/landlord/requests](https://rent-nest-two.vercel.app/api/landlord/requests) **REQUEST RESPONSE** `{ "success": true, "statusCode": 200, "message": "Retrieved all rental requests for landlord's properties successfully!", "data": [ { "id": "0bb9a424-d2c5-422a-b918-3288fec962f9", "propertyId": "976a6056-a5ab-4f90-9657-a036a2a79294", "tenantId": "3c16b1bc-c887-4e1c-8337-c352946467ee", "status": "PAID", "moveInDate": "2026-08-01T00:00:00.000Z", "moveOutDate": "2027-07-31T00:00:00.000Z", "totalMonths": 12, "monthlyRent": "120000", "totalAmount": "1440000", "tenantMessage": "I want to rent this house for my family.", "landlordNote": "Yes, you can contact me.", "approvedAt": "2026-07-19T00:20:52.439Z", "rejectedAt": null, "paidAt": "2026-07-19T00:22:48.565Z", "completedAt": null, "createdAt": "2026-07-19T00:19:42.147Z", "updatedAt": "2026-07-19T00:22:49.332Z", "tenant": { "id": "3c16b1bc-c887-4e1c-8337-c352946467ee", "name": "Abdul Jabbar", "email": "`[abduljabbar@example.com](https://mailto:abduljabbar@example.com)`", "phone": "+8801711111111" }, "properties": { "id": "976a6056-a5ab-4f90-9657-a036a2a79294", "title": "Luxury Penthouse in Gulshan 1", "rentAmount": "120000", "city": "Dhaka", "area": "Gulshan" } }, ] }`

Approves or rejects a tenant's rental request by its ID. Requires a Landlord Bearer token.

**PATCH API**

[https://rent-nest-two.vercel.app/api/landlord/requests/0bb9a424-d2c5-422a-b918-3288fec962f9](https://rent-nest-two.vercel.app/api/landlord/requests/0bb9a424-d2c5-422a-b918-3288fec962f9)

**REQUEST BODY**

`{`

`"status": "APPROVED",`

`"landlordNote": "Welcome! Please complete the payment."`

`}`

**REQUEST RESPONSE**

`{   "success": true,   "statusCode": 200,   "message": "Rental Request Approved or Rejected Successfully!",   "data": {   "id": "0bb9a424-d2c5-422a-b918-3288fec962f9",   "propertyId": "976a6056-a5ab-4f90-9657-a036a2a79294",   "tenantId": "3c16b1bc-c887-4e1c-8337-c352946467ee",   "status": "APPROVED",   "moveInDate": "2026-08-01T00:00:00.000Z",   "moveOutDate": "2027-07-31T00:00:00.000Z",   "totalMonths": 12,   "monthlyRent": "120000",   "totalAmount": "1440000",   "tenantMessage": "I want to rent this house for my family.",   "landlordNote": "Yes, you can contact me.",   "approvedAt": "2026-07-19T00:20:52.439Z",   "rejectedAt": null,   "paidAt": null,   "completedAt": null,   "createdAt": "2026-07-19T00:19:42.147Z",   "updatedAt": "2026-07-19T00:20:52.443Z"   }   }`

request.description:
Submits a new rental request for a property. Requires a Tenant Bearer token.

**POST API**

[https://rent-nest-two.vercel.app/api/rentals](https://rent-nest-two.vercel.app/api/rentals)

**REQUEST BODY**

`{`

`"propertyId": "523c4166-1cf0-4cc5-b42d-fd8ce91220b7",`

`"moveInDate": "2026-08-01T00:00:00.000Z",`

`"moveOutDate": "2027-07-31T00:00:00.000Z",`

`"totalMonths": 12,`

`"tenantMessage": "I want to rent this house for my family.",`

`"monthlyRent": "110000",`

`"totalAmount": "1320000"`

`}`

**REQUEST RESPONSE**

`{   "success": true,   "statusCode": 201,   "message": "Rental Request Created Successfully!",   "data": {   "id": "0bb9a424-d2c5-422a-b918-3288fec962f9",   "propertyId": "976a6056-a5ab-4f90-9657-a036a2a79294",   "tenantId": "3c16b1bc-c887-4e1c-8337-c352946467ee",   "status": "PENDING",   "moveInDate": "2026-08-01T00:00:00.000Z",   "moveOutDate": "2027-07-31T00:00:00.000Z",   "totalMonths": 12,   "monthlyRent": "120000",   "totalAmount": "1440000",   "tenantMessage": "I want to rent this house for my family.",   "landlordNote": null,   "approvedAt": null,   "rejectedAt": null,   "paidAt": null,   "completedAt": null,   "createdAt": "2026-07-19T00:19:42.147Z",   "updatedAt": "2026-07-19T00:19:42.147Z"   }   }`

Retrieves all rental requests submitted by the authenticated tenant. Requires a Tenant Bearer token.

**GET API**

[https://rent-nest-two.vercel.app/api/rentals](https://rent-nest-two.vercel.app/api/rentals)

**REQUEST RESPONSE**

`{ "success": true, "statusCode": 200, "message": "Rental Requests retrieved successfully!", "data": [ { "id": "6c4d0006-34e9-451e-a396-13d0fcfa7163", "propertyId": "2e35aecc-0277-49e4-b09c-335e60526832", "tenantId": "7e1f5913-7747-4565-8f5d-8aba23720e72", "status": "PENDING", "moveInDate": "2026-08-01T00:00:00.000Z", "moveOutDate": "2027-07-31T00:00:00.000Z", "totalMonths": 12, "monthlyRent": "22000", "totalAmount": "72000", "tenantMessage": "I want to rent this apartment for my family.", "landlordNote": null, "approvedAt": null, "rejectedAt": null, "paidAt": null, "completedAt": null, "createdAt": "2026-07-10T13:34:26.936Z", "updatedAt": "2026-07-10T13:34:26.936Z" } ]}`

**GET API**

[https://rent-nest-two.vercel.app/api/rentals/f93955c6-db25-4d5d-9e47-d97889744449](https://rent-nest-two.vercel.app/api/rentals/f93955c6-db25-4d5d-9e47-d97889744449)

**REQUEST RESPONSE**

Retrieves a list of all registered users in the system. [https://rent-nest-two.vercel.app/api/reviews/b3976e9f-34b8-4fec-a551-8c15c25dbccd](https://rent-nest-two.vercel.app/api/reviews/b3976e9f-34b8-4fec-a551-8c15c25dbccd)

`{`

`"comment": "Great place to live Always!"`

`}`
